name: chatgpt-gateway
description: OpenAI-compatible API gateway that uses your logged-in ChatGPT browser session

scripts.build:chrome: mkdir -p dist && cd dist && rm -f chatgpt-gateway-chrome.zip && zip -r chatgpt-gateway-chrome.zip ../manifest.json ../background.js ../content.js ../popup.html ../popup.js ../icons/
scripts.build:firefox: mkdir -p dist && cd dist && rm -f chatgpt-gateway-firefox.zip && cp ../manifest.firefox.json manifest.json && zip -r chatgpt-gateway-firefox.zip manifest.json ../background.js ../content.js ../popup.html ../popup.js ../icons/ && rm manifest.json

author: Draivix
